message:
feat(twitter,youtube): add bulk video/playlist ops and user timeline/trends operations

YouTube:
- Add youtube.list_videos for batch video metadata retrieval by ID
- Add youtube.list_playlists with pagination for channel playlists
- New types: Playlist, PlaylistSnippet, PlaylistContentDetails,
  PlaylistListResponse
- Client methods list_videos() and list_playlists() with unit tests
- Helper require_str_array() for non-empty array validation
- Integration tests with happy path + validation coverage

Twitter:
- Add twitter.user.by_username for username-based user lookup
- Add twitter.user.timeline for paginated tweet timelines
- Add twitter.trends.place integration tests + validation tests
- Update introspect operation count (13 -> 14)

Total: 5 new operations with full FCP2 capability metadata, safety tiers,
idempotency classes, agent hints, and deterministic test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -201,6 +201,50 @@ pub struct ChannelListResponse {
     pub items: Vec<Channel>,
 }
 
+// ── Playlists ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+/// Playlist resource.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct Playlist {
+    pub kind: String,
+    pub etag: String,
+    pub id: String,
+    pub snippet: Option<PlaylistSnippet>,
+    pub content_details: Option<PlaylistContentDetails>,
+}
+
+/// Playlist snippet.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct PlaylistSnippet {
+    pub published_at: Option<String>,
+    pub channel_id: Option<String>,
+    pub title: String,
+    pub description: String,
+    pub thumbnails: Option<ThumbnailSet>,
+    pub channel_title: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Playlist content details.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct PlaylistContentDetails {
+    pub item_count: Option<u32>,
+}
+
+/// Playlist list response.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct PlaylistListResponse {
+    pub kind: String,
+    pub etag: String,
+    pub next_page_token: Option<String>,
+    pub prev_page_token: Option<String>,
+    pub page_info: Option<PageInfo>,
+    pub items: Vec<Playlist>,
+}
+
 // ── Playlist Items ──────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 /// Playlist item resource.
